repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.abstract: Promotional posters for pop and rock music bands printed in England, Germany, Denmark, and other European countries, 1970s-2006.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Promotional posters for pop and rock music bands printed in England, Germany, Denmark, and other European countries, 1970s-2006.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Popular music Poster Collection, #8100. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

did.unittitle: Pop, Rock concerts in Germany posters
Pop, Rock concerts in Germany posters
Pop, Rock concerts & album release in Austria

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Rolling Stones, Shakira, Rammstein, Phil Collins, Rod Stewart, Kylie Minogue, Nina Hagen, Sting, Iggy Pop, Bon Jovi, Eric Clapton, Billy Joel, etc.

did.unittitle: Pop, Rock concerts & album release in Austria

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Rolling Stones, Shakira, Rammstein, Phil Collins, Rod Stewart, Kylie Minogue, Nina Hagen, Sting, Iggy Pop, Bon Jovi, Eric Clapton, Billy Joel, etc.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Mostly in San Francisco, some in Germany & Austria

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Mostly in San Francisco, some in Germany & Austria

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Package included note: "It's hardcore-punk baby! / Koterkacke - Kiezpunk F-Hain / Stalinstadt Ensemble - Zonen-HC Punk-Brigade Schuttstadt / Sax and Violins - Aparte 80's hits cover Tanzkapelle DD"

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Package included note: "It's hardcore-punk baby! / Koterkacke - Kiezpunk F-Hain / Stalinstadt Ensemble - Zonen-HC Punk-Brigade Schuttstadt / Sax and Violins - Aparte 80's hits cover Tanzkapelle DD"

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The ones by Constantin Film are dated in the code on bottom margin of poster.

scopecontent.p: The ones by Constantin Film are dated in the code on bottom margin of poster.

scopecontent.p: The ones by Constantin Film are dated in the code on bottom margin of poster.
